DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 13, 2013 TO GIVE MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 5, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT WAS PROVIDED WITH A COURTESY COPIES OF THE PROPOSED ORDER ONLY. BRAD KAPLAN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF MOVING PARTY'S PAPERS; DEFENDANT CHRISTOPH SOTO HAS NOT FILED ANY OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION, NOR PROVIDED ANY RESPONSE TO THE DISCOVERY. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE SERVE PLAINTIFF WITH VERIFIED RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, WITHIN 15 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. PRO TEM JUDGE: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/MJM

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Dismissal - No Appearance

Plaintiff Midland Funding Llc'S Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff Midland Funding LLC'S Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents is Granted, for reasons set forth in plaintiff moving party's papers; defendant Christoph Soto has not filed any opposition to the motion, nor provided any response to the discovery. Defendant is ordered to provide serve plaintiff with verified responses to plaintiff's Request For Production of Documents, Set One, without objections, within 15 days. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/MJM

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents is continued on the court's own motion to March 13, 2013 to give Midland Funding, LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Midland Funding, LLC must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 5, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court was provided with a courtesy copies of the proposed order only. Brad Kaplan, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Set For Trial On May-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
